name: Greeley Farmers Market

Months Open.value: May, June, July, August, September, October

Products.value: Seasonal fruits, vegetables, flowers, seafood and meats, cheese, eggs, coffee, tea, bakery and bread, and a sampling of handmade goods

notes: The on-file website (https://greeleygov.com/activities/fm/home) is dead/redirected: greeleygov.com now 301-redirects to greeleyco.gov, and the /activities/fm/home path itself now 404s. The correct current official City of Greeley page is https://greeleyco.gov/events/farmers-market/. Market runs Saturdays 8am-12pm, May-October 2026 (closed July 4th for Stampede parade), at 7th Street between 9th & 10th Ave, north of Lincoln Park, downtown Greeley (differs slightly from the on-file address of 902 7th Ave, so address was not changed since the market's exact block location isn't a single street address). A separate winter market (1st & 3rd Saturdays, Nov-Apr, indoors at Zoe's Cafe and Events, 715 10th St) also exists per the city page but was not included since it's a distinct seasonal listing. No phone number or certified-organic status stated on the official page.
